guardrails.note: Read-only workflow audit. It verifies that scheduled project automation runs reports and gates, but does not review or publish articles.
guardrails.stopBefore: Stop before mark:review, publish dry-run, or publish confirm. Human approval is required for every status or publishing change.

checks.name: project automation runs on main push
project automation has frequent scheduled runs
project automation runs the full read-only automation chain
project automation refreshes live search and digest surfaces
checks.detail: live:check, automation:gate, and automation:digest are present

checks.name: project automation exposes reports as job summary and artifact
checks.detail: job summary and upload-artifact are present

checks.name: scheduled report commits are limited to schedule or manual dispatch
workflow does not run review or publish commands
checks.detail: no mark:review or publish:articles commands found in workflows

checks.name: content check still builds the public site
